questions.text: The sum of angles in a triangle is:
questions.explanation: The sum of all three interior angles of any triangle is always 180°.

questions.text: An equilateral triangle has all sides equal.
questions.explanation: An equilateral triangle has all three sides equal and all three angles equal to 60°.

questions.correctAnswer: In a right-angled triangle, hypotenuse² = base² + height²
questions.explanation: Pythagoras theorem states that in a right-angled triangle, the square of the hypotenuse equals the sum of squares of the other two sides.

questions.text: A triangle with one angle 90° is called a ________ triangle.
questions.explanation: A right-angled triangle has one angle measuring exactly 90°.
